title: Beans for Life
description: B E A N S | This pack modifies the language file to replace everything related to "Resin" with "Beans"
body:
# **_BEANS_**



What does this pack do?

This pack modifies language files so that everything "Resin" related is now called "Beans". The Minecraft update that everyone has waited for so long!



This pack features:
 - Bean
 - Cooked Bean
 - Block of Beans
 - Bean Material
 - Bean Bricks
 - Bean Brick Wall
 - Bean Brick Stairs
 - Bean Brick Slab
 - Chiseled Bean Bricks



This pack does not require any mods or anything else - it will work on the base game starting with snapshot 24w44a or Minecraft 1.21.4

---

Anybody is free to use this pack anywhere. Just do not rename the pack, please.
